def negative_full_response_or_export_buffered_before_incremental_consumer_use():
    rule_id = "full_response_or_export_buffered_before_incremental_consumer_use"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag producers that fully buffer large outputs before handing them to a consumer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
